gpu: AMD Radeon RX 550 / 550 (radeonsi, polaris12, ACO, DRM 3.63, 6.15.9-arch1-1)
title: Left 4 Dead 2

notes:
When I launch the game without Vulkan, it runs great until I install the Nightmare mod and because of this, the shadows completely break, become square and they are not transparent.
 
And when I launch with Vulkan, the game opens for about 40 seconds and just closes.
 
But if I launch from any Proton (for example: Proton CachyOS), then the game launches perfectly but,  
Many addons from Nightmare simply do not work, however, if I install the full version of Nightmare, then everything works and there are no bugs with shadows.

But still, I can't play normally with addons from the workshop.
title: Left 4 Dead 2
